headline: Exploring the top movers within the dow jones index during today's session.

headline: Solventum Trends for 2026: AI Coding, Tariffs, and Margins
summary: SOLV heads into 2026 balancing AI coding growth, cost savings, tariff pressure and a potential 2027 margin risk tied to its 3M supply deal.

headline: 3M Announces New Board Appointment
summary: 3M (NYSE: MMM) announced today the election of Jennifer W. Rumsey to 3M's Board of Directors, effective June 5, 2026. Ms. Rumsey also has been appointed as a member of the Science, Technology and Sustainability Committee of the Board.
